texto: I was down but now I'm up This all got the same Now I'm up like a seesaw when I'm on a beat Like an old man's lawn, better keep off From the ground to the treatise Got clouds on my feet like Jack in the beat I jumped off quick, went straight in a free fall Bag in the seat like a guy making big, big, big moves Tick-tock turned into a tick-tick-tick, boom Yeah, went and turned it where? I was down but now I'm up Let's go

segmentos.text: I was down but now I'm up
Now I'm up like a seesaw when I'm on a beat
Like an old man's lawn, better keep off
From the ground to the treatise
Got clouds on my feet like Jack in the beat
I jumped off quick, went straight in a free fall
Bag in the seat like a guy making big, big, big moves
Tick-tock turned into a tick-tick-tick, boom
Yeah, went and turned it where?
I was down but now I'm up
